# CE App Platform — llms.txt

Authoritative, compact reference for LLM agents. Everything here is deployed and live at
https://ce-net.com. No account, server, or API key required. No emojis anywhere (plain text).

CE gives you four capabilities with no infrastructure:
- App hosting: static sites and SPAs, globally reachable, hot reload.
- Database: persistent per-app key-value store, JSON values, newest-first lists.
- Realtime: pub/sub rooms over WebSocket, last 50 messages replayed on connect.
- Compute: push WASM / JS / Python tasks to live mesh nodes and read the result.

The hub is service ce-hub, public via nginx at ce-net.com. Every path also works under
/hub/<path>.

## Origins / public URL shapes
- Path hosting:        https://ce-net.com/apps/<id>/
- Dev subdomain:       https://<id>.ce-net.com/            (wildcard DNS is live)
- Custom domain:       https://<custom-domain>/            (CNAME -> ce-net.com, then register)
- /db/<app>/<key> and wss://ce-net.com/rt/<app>/<room> work on all of the above origins.
- nginx sets X-CE-Host for CNAME'd domains; the hub resolves via GET /_host/*path.

## HTTP API (hub)
Compute:
  POST /tasks -> {node,lang,func,ok,value,ms,error}
    wasm: {"func":"count_primes","args":[200000],"ret":"i32","module":"demo"}
    code: {"lang":"js"|"python","code":"i=>i.a+i.b","input":{...},"func":"task"}
    optional "target":"<full node id>". 503 if no nodes; 504 if chosen node timed out.
Metrics:
  GET /stats -> nodes, cores, ram_gb, storage_gb, gpus[], gpu_count, gpu_vram_gb,
    webgpu_nodes, perf_score, tasks_run, blobs, blob_bytes, avg_uptime_pct,
    by_class{phone,laptop,server,device}, most_reliable{short,uptime_pct}, latency_p50_ms,
    latency_p95_ms, latency_measured, data_used_bytes, hosted_apps, replicas,
    limits{max_data_bytes,max_apps,max_domains,max_db_namespaces}.
  GET /stats/stream -> SSE of the /stats object (~1.5s cadence).
  GET /nodes -> {nodes:[{id,short,cores,ram_gb,storage_gb,gpu,webgpu,platform,tasks_run,
    age_s,rtt_ms,uptime_pct,device_class,online_secs,sessions,first_seen_unix}]}.
  GET /node -> WebSocket for browser/headless nodes (up: hello/hb/pong/result; down:
    job/ping/store/fetch).
Blobs (content-addressed):
  PUT /blobs/:hash  (raw body + content-type) -> {hash,size}.
  GET /blobs/:hash.
App hosting (static + SPA):
  PUT /apps/:id/*path (raw body + content-type) -> {id,path,version,url}. Empty path=index.html.
  GET /apps/:id , /apps/:id/ , /apps/:id/*path -> serves files; SPA fallback (route-like miss
    with no file extension returns index.html, 200); HTML gets a hot-reload snippet injected.
  GET /apps/:id/__reload -> SSE; emits the version number on every change.
  PUT /apps/:id/config {"spa":true} ; GET /apps/:id/config -> {spa,version,domains}.
Custom domains:
  PUT /apps/:id/domain {"domain":"app.acme.com"} -> {domain,id,cname:"ce-net.com"}.
  DELETE /apps/:id/domain/:domain ; GET /domains -> [{domain,id}].
Database (persistent KV, namespaced per app):
  PUT /db/:app/:key (JSON body) -> {ok,key}.
  GET /db/:app/:key -> value | 404.
  DELETE /db/:app/:key.
  GET /db/:app?prefix=&limit= -> {items:[{key,value}],n} (newest-first).
Realtime:
  GET /rt/:app/:room -> WebSocket; any text frame broadcast to others; last 50 replayed.

## CLI (ce-app)
  npm create ce-app                  scaffold the chat template
  ce-app new [template] [dir]        scaffold a template (no name lists available)
  ce-app dev                         build + watch + live-upload; prints the public URL
  ce-app deploy                      auto-detect framework, build, upload, enable SPA routing
  ce-app domain add <domain>         register a custom production domain (prints CNAME + TLS)
  ce-app domain rm <domain>          unregister a custom domain
  ce-app domain ls                   list this app's custom domains
  ce-app detect                      print detected framework + output dir (no network)
  ce-app smoke                       build a fixture + run detection self-checks (no network)
  Options: --hub <base> (default https://ce-net.com or $CE_HUB), --app <id> (default
  ./.ce/app-id, auto-created as 16 hex), -h/--help.
  Templates: chat, notes, board, vite-react, svelte, react, next, react-native.
  Auto-detected: Vite (vanilla/React/Vue/Svelte), SvelteKit (static), Next.js (static
  export), Astro (static), Nuxt (static generate), Create React App, Expo / react-native-web
  (web export), plain static, and the built-in esbuild path (src/main + src/index.html).

## SDKs / client
  @ce/client (browser ESM, web/ce-app/client): createClient(opts?) ->
    {appId, base, db:{get,set,del,list}, room(name):{send,on,onOpen,close}}.
    appId auto-resolves from the /apps/<id>/ path or the <id>.ce-net.com host.
    Options: {app?, base?}.
  Python SDK (web/sdks/python, package "ce"): Client(app?) -> run_task(...),
    db.{get,set,delete,list}, room(name).{on,on_open,send,run}.
  Go SDK (web/sdks/go, package "ce"): ce.New(app) -> RunTask(...),
    DB.{Get,Set,Del,List}, Room(name).{On,OnOpen,Send,Run}.
  ce-rs is the Rust node SDK.
  Compute task languages: wasm, js (sandboxed Worker), python (Pyodide, browser nodes only).
  Headless worker (web/site/worker.js) runs wasm + js.

## Run a node
  Browser:  open https://ce-net.com/node  (WASM/JS compute node + mesh peer; iOS/Android too).
  Headless: curl -fsSL https://ce-net.com/worker.js | node - --hub wss://ce-net.com/hub
  Metrics:  https://ce-net.com/network  (nodes, cores, GPU, RAM, uptime/reliability %, latency).

## Storage limits (HTTP 507 on overflow; env-configurable)
  Global: CE_HUB_MAX_DATA_BYTES (512 MiB), CE_HUB_MAX_APPS (200), CE_HUB_MAX_DOMAINS (100),
    CE_HUB_MAX_DB_NAMESPACES (500).
  Per item: 16 MB/file, 64 MB/app, 200 files/app, 16 MB/blob, 256 MB blob store, 5000 db
    keys/namespace.
  Contributor node cache: browser 32 MiB (?cache=), worker 64 MiB
    (CE_WORKER_MAX_CACHE_BYTES), oldest-evicted. Detail: web/deploy/storage-limits.md.

## Failure codes
  503 on POST /tasks: no nodes connected. Start a node, re-check GET /stats.
  504 on POST /tasks: chosen node timed out. Retry or pin "target".
  507 on any write:   over a storage limit.
  404 on GET /db/:app/:key: key absent (SDKs map to undefined/None/nil).

## Worked examples

# 1) Scaffold + deploy + custom domain
npm create ce-app
cd ce-app && npx ce-app deploy        # live at /apps/<id>/ and <id>.ce-net.com
# CNAME app.acme.com -> ce-net.com, then:
npx ce-app domain add app.acme.com

# 2) Guestbook feed on the database (newest-first via timestamp keys)
curl -X PUT "https://ce-net.com/db/guestbook/entry:$(date +%s%3N)" \
  -H "content-type: application/json" -d '{"name":"Alice","msg":"first!"}'
curl "https://ce-net.com/db/guestbook?prefix=entry:&limit=20"

# 3) Realtime chat with durable history (browser, @ce/client)
#   import { createClient } from "@ce/client";
#   const ce = createClient(); const room = ce.room("lobby");
#   const history = await ce.db.list("msg:", 50);      // newest-first replay
#   room.on((m) => render(m));                          // others' messages (no self-echo)
#   async function post(text){ const m={text,at:Date.now()};
#     await ce.db.set(`msg:${m.at}`, m); room.send(m); render(m); }

# 4) Push compute to the mesh and read the result
curl "https://ce-net.com/stats"                         # ensure nodes > 0
curl -X POST "https://ce-net.com/tasks" \
  -H "content-type: application/json" \
  -d '{"lang":"js","code":"i=>i.a+i.b","input":{"a":2,"b":3},"func":"task"}'
# -> {"node":"...","ok":true,"value":5,"ms":3}
curl -X POST "https://ce-net.com/tasks" \
  -H "content-type: application/json" \
  -d '{"func":"count_primes","args":[200000],"ret":"i32","module":"demo"}'
